location.name: Throne of Frost
location.description: The seat of the Frost King — an ancient giant who has ruled the Frostreach since before memory. His throne room is a cathedral of ice a mile deep, where the temperature drops below anything natural. This is the heart of the cold that thinks.

enemies.name: Frost Giant Warrior
enemies.description: A fully armored frost giant — twenty feet of ice-blue muscle and enchanted iron. They fight with discipline learned over centuries.

enemies.name: Ice Drake
enemies.description: A dragon cousin adapted to the extreme cold. Its breath weapon is a cone of absolute zero that flash-freezes everything it touches.

enemies.name: Throne Guardian
enemies.description: An elite guardian forged from enchanted ice by the Frost King himself. It is programmed with a thousand years of combat technique.

mechanic.name: Absolute Zero
mechanic.description: The cold is supernatural. Take 3% max HP damage per room and all healing reduced by 20%.

events.name: Frozen Legion
events.text: Hundreds of frost giant warriors, frozen mid-battle in perfect ice. Their weapons are still raised, their faces locked in fury.

choices.label: Loot weapons from the frozen giants (STR DC 13)

success.text: You pry a giant's weapon free. The metal is incredible quality.

failure.text: The ice grabs your arm. You wrench free but lose skin.

success.text: You recognize tactical patterns. This knowledge will serve you in combat.

failure.text: The formations make no sense. Giant warfare is alien to you.

success.text: You walk among the dead. They deserve that much.

events.name: Lesser Throne
events.text: A smaller throne room — a lieutenant's chamber. The throne itself is made of drake bones and permafrost.

success.text: Cold power surges through you. The throne accepts you, temporarily. Ancient knowledge fills your mind.

failure.text: The throne rejects you. Frost burns through your armor, searing flesh.

choices.label: Strip the throne for materials (STR DC 12)

success.text: You extract drake bone and permafrost ore from the throne's structure.

failure.text: The throne is magically reinforced. You can't break it apart.

success.text: Thrones are for kings. You're not ready for that yet.

events.name: Ice Drake Nest
events.text: A nest of ice and bone, with massive drake eggs radiating cold. The drake parents are somewhere nearby.

success.text: You snatch an egg and escape before the parents return. Incredibly valuable.

failure.text: A drake returns. Its ice breath catches your back as you flee.

choices.label: Harvest shed scales from the nest (WIS DC 12)

success.text: You find shed drake scales among the nesting material. Less risky, still valuable.

failure.text: You disturb the eggs. They emit a piercing shriek that draws attention.

success.text: You're brave, not stupid. Drake parents are not to be trifled with.

events.name: Giant Armory
events.text: A vast room filled with giant-sized weapons and armor. Most are too large for you, but the materials are priceless.

success.text: You strip down several weapons for their ore and bone.

failure.text: A weapon rack collapses on you. Heavy.

success.text: Hidden among the giant gear, you find equipment sized for a human — trophies from past victims.

failure.text: Nothing your size. Everything here was built for beings three times taller.

success.text: Impressive, but impractical for your needs.

events.name: Deep Frozen Spring
events.text: A spring of liquid water in the deepest part of the throne. Impossible — nothing should be liquid here. It glows faintly.

success.text: The water is pure power. Cold, but it heals and restores.

failure.text: The water is supernaturally cold. It burns like fire going down.

success.text: You bottle some of the magical water. It crystallizes into essence.

failure.text: The water refuses to be contained. It freezes solid in your hands.

success.text: The spring bubbles quietly. A mystery for another day.

events.name: Aldric's History
events.text: Massive murals depict the Frost King's rise to power. One panel shows a hidden vault, its location encoded in runes.

success.text: You find the vault behind a false wall. Inside: the king's personal reserve of drake scales.

failure.text: The code leads you to a trapped alcove. Ice spears fire from the walls.

choices.label: Study the history for tactical advantage (WIS DC 11)

success.text: You learn Aldric's fighting style from the murals. Useful for the coming battle.

failure.text: The murals are propagandistic and misleading. No real intel.

success.text: History is written by the victors. Time to make some history of your own.
